text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few weeks have passed since our<n>info session
at the academy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The reboot project is chugging along.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
We're starting the day off with our<n>petition again.
Let's get some more<n>signatures, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Order received. I will make further<n>progress on this
mission.

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: Um, e-excuse me?

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text: Sorry to butt in, but could we help out<n>too?!

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
Hearing what Hello and Tachyon said<n>the other
day really got us thinking.

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text: I know you're probably like, sonow you want to help? But, well...

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: We want to make the Grand Concert<n>happen!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me! Mind if we pitch in too? If<n>it's just
getting signatures, we can<n>do that.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
And if you need more hands on deck,<n>I can call in
some friends! Please, let<n>me do my part!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh my gosh, you guys!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Wow, I never expected we'd get this<n>many
signatures in just one hour!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Um, the extra sheets just got here. If<n>anyone's
free, I could use some help<n>carrying them.

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text: ...Maybe I could help with that?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: You're...

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text:
You say it's for the fans, but to me it<n>just sounds
like an excuse to escape<n>from the reality that we
can't win!

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text:
Truth be told, I'm still not fully on<n>board with
everything. But...

text_block_list.name: Assembled Student C
text_block_list.text:
And I want to tell them that I'm not<n>done yet! That
no matter how many<n>times I lose, I have a goal,
and I<n>won't give up on it no matter what!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The Grand Concert is not so noble.<n>Rather, it is an
arena where egos<n>clash—yours and your fans'!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Use it not for your fans, but for<n>yourself—for the
sake of broadening<n>your own potential!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
I want to see all of you shining on<n>stage at the
Grand Concert as the<n>stars of the show!

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I'm just looking to run<n>away... but if the
Grand Concert really<n>is a space where we can be
selfish...

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text: And I know this is really, really,self-centered, but there's something Iwant my fans to know.

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text:
I want to tell them that even if I<n>haven't been able
to get a win, I<n>haven't given up either, so please
don't give up on me!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Your words will reach them! I know<n>they will, so,
um...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I want you to say everything you<n>have to say,
then look at all your<n>fans' faces, and get excited
to sing<n>with a smile again!

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hello! Would you mind if, you know...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: ...Say no more. We'd greatly<n>appreciate your help.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
We're all coming from different<n>places, with
different motives and<n>different feelings to
convey—it<n>wouldn't be the Grand Concert
otherwise.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All of a sudden, it feels like we're<n>surrounded by
students and fans<n>wanting to help out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, we spread the word about<n>our project
until the sun sets.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...To think our supporters would reach<n>six digits.
Truly a massive figure.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Yes, and I'm so grateful for it! To all<n>of you
students, and to our fans too!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
As a researcher, I have much to be<n>grateful for as
well—the data set will<n>be more than sufficient.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But a reality check is in order. Now<n>that we have
all these supporters...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
We can't seriously expect they'll all<n>be able to
participate, can we?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The more people we get, the harder<n>it'll be to
organize the actual event.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Is there even a venue with the<n>necessary
capacity?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: We'll make do. I promise I'll find a<n>way!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
We've come this far. I refuse to<n>believe we have
to give up on our<n>vision!

text_block_list.name: Sound Staff
text_block_list.text:
No need to put it all on yourself. I'll<n>ask around
about a venue.

text_block_list.name: Lighting Staff
text_block_list.text:
We've come this far together. Might<n>as well see it
through.

text_block_list.name: Technical Staff
text_block_list.text: We're all tried and true fans of yours<n>now!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: You guys...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, so I might've just had a genius<n>idea! What if
we... turned this into a<n>whole festival?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: A festival?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! If we can't all fit into one<n>venue, why not
get more venues?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
We could have different stages, like<n>A, B, and C,
and then fans could go<n>wherever their favs are
performing!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And to top it all off, we could do a<n>livestream of the
whole event too.<n>Each stage will be different, but...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Everyone will get to have fun! And<n>the scale of it
will get people hyped<n>up!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: I see... That does sound like a genius<n>idea!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Right? I even have a location in mind<n>already...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzt, bzzt!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Whose phone is that?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Sorry, that's me. I'll call them back<n>la—

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Trainer, could I ask you to take over<n>for a minute?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: I'll be right back!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Light Hello runs off, leaving me in<n>charge of
molding Smart Falcon's<n>ideas into a plan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We spend some time brainstorming<n>with our trusty
staff team, everyone<n>chiming in to make the Grand
Concert<n>the best it can be.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That evening...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After seeing the students back to the<n>academy, I
finally hear from Light<n>Hello.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Traineeer!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... So this afternoon... the URAboard came to observe us, and...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: And... sniffle... and they said...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
They said they'd offer their support<n>for the Grand
Concert...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Uwaaaah! We... we did it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tears fall freely from Light Hello's<n>eyes. All the
days of hard work<n>we've had together run
through my<n>mind.
choice_data_list: Well, sounds like we have work to do!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Yes! ...Yes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're just a few steps away from<n>the Grand
Concert.
